description_long: This is a dark-colored luxury SUV with a boxy, robust design reminiscent of the Mercedes-Benz G-Class. The vehicle features a high roofline, large tinted windows, and a prominent spare tire mounted on the rear door. The front grille is wide and flanked by circular headlights, while the body is accented by pronounced wheel arches and side steps. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with a glossy finish, and the SUV has a sunroof visible on the roof. Subtle chrome details and black trim add to its upscale, urban-ready appearance.
description: A dark, boxy luxury SUV with large alloy wheels, tinted windows, and a rear-mounted spare tire, styled for urban environments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the SUV's boxy profile, large windows, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the wide grille, circular headlights, and raised hood.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible side steps and wheel arches.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the spare tire on the back door and rear lights.
attribute_wheel_design: multi-spoke alloy wheels with a glossy black finish
